description: Route evaluation fixtures for jvc skills. These cases document expected skill activation and near-neighbor boundaries; scripts/check-skill-evals.py validates fixture integrity and source-contract coverage.

cases.prompt: 帮我快速过一遍这个 deck，做项目初筛，按市场、痛点、方案、团队、时机、商业模式和显性风险输出关键问题。

near_neighbors.why_not: ic-memo is for full investment committee synthesis after multiple prior materials exist; this is a quick screen.

cases.prompt: 把这段客户访谈逐字稿整理成一问一答的 Word 问答纪要，回答要保留完整回答、对应事实层维度和待验证点。

near_neighbors.why_not: meeting-notes is the six-section fact note; this prompt asks for Q&A structure and complete answers.

cases.prompt: 根据这次创始人访谈逐字稿和我的现场随笔，生成结构化 Word 访谈纪要，按公司基本情况、技术、团队、产品、商业化、融资情况整理。

near_neighbors.why_not: talk-notes should trigger when the user explicitly wants Q&A structure.

cases.prompt: 基于 deck 和访谈纪要，提炼这个项目为什么值得认真看的 bull case，按行业趋势、技术节点、团队优势、商业化进展写投资亮点和待验证项。

near_neighbors.why_not: ic-memo synthesizes all prior materials into a ten-section memo; this prompt asks only for positive arguments.

cases.prompt: 基于这些项目材料做反向论证，扮演挑剔 LP、竞品 CEO、怀疑论同行和 IC boss，输出为什么不投以及可证伪条件。

near_neighbors.why_not: bull-case extracts positive investment arguments; this prompt asks for adversarial no-invest arguments.

cases.prompt: 把 prescreen、bull case、bear case、赛道研究、竞品和回报模型合成一版 IC memo 初稿，风险篇幅不能少于投资逻辑。
skill_contract_signals: 风险与反方观点」的篇幅是否不少于第 7 章

near_neighbors.why_not: bull-case only extracts positive arguments and must not produce the full investment committee memo.

cases.prompt: 帮我做一个玻璃基板赛道研究，先讲行业定义、行业简史、技术路线、产业链图谱、政策趋势和关键玩家。

near_neighbors.why_not: comps-dd should trigger when the user asks for competitors/comparable companies and an Excel workbook.

cases.prompt: 读取这个玻璃基板 Obsidian 文件夹，把已有资料整理成递归问题树、Mermaid 图、nodes.json、证据索引和开放问题。

near_neighbors.why_not: track-research owns first-pass web research; this prompt asks to transform existing local source files into reusable tree artifacts.

cases.prompt: 围绕这个项目做竞品分析，找直接竞品、可比公司、上下游参照和海外标杆，最后输出 Excel 工作簿。

near_neighbors.why_not: track-research builds the sector map; this prompt asks for company comparison output.

cases.prompt: 测算这个细分赛道市场规模，要同时做 TAM/SAM/SOM 的自上而下和自下而上模型，并输出 Excel。

near_neighbors.why_not: track-research can discuss market trends, but it does not own the Excel market-sizing model.

cases.prompt: 根据本轮条款、后续融资稀释、三种退出情形和财务预测，做 MOIC/IRR 回报测算 Excel。

near_neighbors.why_not: market-sizing estimates market size; this prompt asks for investment return modeling.

cases.prompt: 给实习生解释 TAM、SAM、SOM 分别是什么意思，举一个简单例子即可。
cases.no_route_reason: This is a teaching request, not a reusable market-sizing workbook task.

cases.prompt: 整理这个月差旅发票，OCR 识别 PDF，人工复核后生成报销汇总 Excel，并按项目归档。

near_neighbors.why_not: comps-dd is diligence research; invoice-manager is operational filing and must not enter investment judgment.
